name: Blushing Bunny
recipeInstructions:
1. Split and toast the English muffins.
2. In a medium saucepan, whisk together undiluted cheddar cheese soup and tomato soup until smooth.
3. Add water, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and drained white tuna to the saucepan. Stir well.
4. Cook the mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly, until hot and bubbly.
5. Spoon the mixture onto the muffin halves.
Serves 4.
Posted by Ethel Snyder
Date: August 08, 1997
